events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes troweling bleed water back into concrete during finishing, which is a known defective practice that causes dusting and scaling. ACI 302 and ACI 308 prohibit finishing operations that incorporate bleed water back into the surface. This is a sequence/procedure violation.

  "findings": [
    "Bleed water is being troweled back into the concrete surface, which traps water at the surface and weakens the paste, leading to dusting and scaling.",
    "Finishing operations began before bleed water had ceased and before the surface was ready for troweling."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all troweling immediately.",
    "Do not work bleed water back into the slab; wait for bleed water to evaporate or remove it per ACI guidance before continuing finishing.",
    "Assess the finished surface for defects; plan for removal and replacement or remediation of the affected surface layer if dusting/scaling is present.",
    "Verify mix design, placement rate, and curing plan before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "ACI 302 and ACI 308 require that bleed water cease and the surface be ready before troweling; incorporating bleed water back into the surface creates a weak, non-durable surface layer (dusting/scaling), making the work non-compliant and defective.",
  "references": ["ACI 302", "ACI 308"]
}
